campaigns.name: InfiniBand NDR400: Powering Next-Gen HPC Clusters
campaigns.targetAudience: University HPC centres, research computing labs, and AI research institutions building or expanding GPU clusters
campaigns.headline: Unlock 400Gb/s Fabric Performance for Your AI & HPC Workloads
campaigns.keyMessage: The Mellanox InfiniBand NDR400 Switch delivers ultra-low latency and 400Gb/s throughput — the backbone of modern multi-node GPU training clusters. Eliminate interconnect bottlenecks and scale your LLM training, CFD, and genomics workloads with confidence.
campaigns.urgencyTrigger: Limited stock available for Q3 deployment timelines — secure units before EOFY procurement cycles close
campaigns.estimatedImpact: 5-12 qualified enquiries from HPC/research segment; 1-2 cluster-scale opportunities (A$50k+ basket potential per deal)
campaigns.suggestedTiming: Launch within 7 days; sustain 3-week nurture cadence aligned with university capex planning (June-July AU FY close)
campaigns.reasoning: With zero product views and no traffic signals, the NDR400 needs awareness-building rather than discounting. Interconnect switches are rarely browsed organically — buyers reach them via solution conversations. A featured-product campaign positioning it as a cluster enabler is more effective than a price promo at A$6,350 (already near margin floor given A$500 min margin constraint).

campaigns.name: Build Your AI Cluster: Architecture Briefing Series
campaigns.targetAudience: CTOs, Heads of Research Computing, and Infrastructure Architects at Go8 universities, CSIRO-adjacent labs, and AI-first enterprises
campaigns.headline: From Single GPU to Multi-Node: Architecting AI Infrastructure That Scales
campaigns.keyMessage: Tensor Works' solutions team walks you through reference architectures for AI training clusters — covering compute, interconnect (InfiniBand NDR), storage, and cooling. Vendor-neutral guidance, Australian support, enterprise SLAs.
campaigns.urgencyTrigger: Q3 FY26 capex windows closing — lead times on interconnect fabric currently 8-12 weeks
campaigns.estimatedImpact: Top-of-funnel: 20-40 briefing requests over 6 weeks; pipeline seeding for H2 FY26
campaigns.suggestedTiming: Begin immediately; the site currently has near-zero traffic (4 sessions/day) so demand-generation is the priority over conversion optimisation
campaigns.reasoning: Analytics show critically low traffic (4 sessions on the sample day, no product views). Conversion-focused campaigns will underperform until top-of-funnel is rebuilt. An awareness campaign establishes Tensor Works as a trusted advisor and creates the contextual demand needed to sell high-ASP infrastructure like the NDR400.

campaigns.name: Research Institution Procurement Program
campaigns.targetAudience: Procurement and grant-funded PIs at Australian universities and medical research institutes (WEHI, Garvan, QIMR, etc.)
campaigns.headline: Grant-Funded AI Infrastructure? We Speak Your Procurement Language
campaigns.keyMessage: Tensor Works supports ARC/NHMRC grant-aligned quoting, multi-year warranty bundling, and compliance documentation for research procurement. From single workstations to full cluster fabrics like NDR400 InfiniBand.
campaigns.urgencyTrigger: Align quotes with mid-year grant disbursement cycles
campaigns.estimatedImpact: Build qualified research-sector email list (target 150+ opt-ins); 3-5 quote requests in first cycle
campaigns.suggestedTiming: Email send week commencing 25 May; follow-up sequence over 4 weeks
campaigns.reasoning: Research institutions have predictable, grant-driven buying cycles distinct from enterprise. A targeted email program nurtures this segment specifically and surfaces interconnect needs naturally. With no historical view data, this builds the first-party data foundation needed for future campaign personalisation.

priorityOrder: Build Your AI Cluster: Architecture Briefing Series
InfiniBand NDR400: Powering Next-Gen HPC Clusters
marketInsight: Current analytics signal a cold-start problem: only 4 sessions/day, zero product views, and no competitor or BI data to triangulate against. The single slow-moving SKU (NDR400 InfiniBand switch) is a high-ASP infrastructure component that is rarely bought via self-serve browsing — it's sold through solution consultations. Recommended strategic posture: prioritise demand-generation and account-based outreach to research/HPC segments over conversion optimisation or discounting. Discounting the NDR400 is not advised given the A$500 minimum margin constraint and the fact that low views indicate an awareness gap, not a price objection. Focus the next 60 days on rebuilding top-of-funnel traffic and establishing solution-selling motions; revisit data-driven personalisation once baseline traffic exceeds ~100 sessions/day.
